meta.summary: SnpEff and SnpSift 5.4c for annotating genetic variants and filtering or manipulating annotated VCF files.
meta.description: SnpEff and SnpSift 5.4c for annotating genetic variants and filtering or manipulating annotated VCF files.

test: snpEff -Xmx512m -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'SnpEff' >/dev/null && snpEff -Xmx512m -version 2>&1 | grep -F '5.4c' >/dev/null && snpEff -Xmx512m -version 2>&1 | grep -F '2026-02-23' >/dev/null && java -version 2>&1 | grep -F '21' >/dev/null

snpEff -Xmx512m -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Available commands:' >/dev/null && snpEff -Xmx512m -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Annotate variants' >/dev/null && test -s /opt/snpeff/snpEff.config && grep -F 'GRCh37.75.genome' /opt/snpeff/snpEff.config >/dev/null
SnpSift filter -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'SnpSift version 5.4c' >/dev/null && SnpSift filter -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: java -jar SnpSift.jar filter' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-snpeff-filter-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; SnpSift filter '( QUAL >= 20 )' /opt/snpeff/examples/test.vcf > "$tmp/filtered.vcf" 2>"$tmp/filter.log"; test -s "$tmp/filtered.vcf" && grep -F '##SnpSiftVersion="SnpSift 5.4c' "$tmp/filtered.vcf" >/dev/null && grep -F '10469' "$tmp/filtered.vcf" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

tmp=/tmp/taf-snpeff-extract-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; mkdir -p "$tmp"; SnpSift extractFields /opt/snpeff/examples/test.ann.vcf CHROM POS REF ALT 'ANN[*].EFFECT' > "$tmp/fields.tsv" 2>"$tmp/extract.log"; test -s "$tmp/fields.tsv" && grep -F 'CHROM' "$tmp/fields.tsv" >/dev/null && grep -F 'upstream_gene_variant' "$tmp/fields.tsv" >/dev/null; rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: SnpEff
upstream.citation: Cingolani et al. 2012; Cingolani et al. 2012 SnpSift
